name: project-steward
description: Cross-agent project stewardship: interactive init (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md), repo-resident progress tracking, crash-resilient cross-tool session handoff/resume, and a task-backend broker. State lives in .project-steward/ and travels via git. Native Windows requires the project-steward CLI on PATH (pipx install project-steward); POSIX hosts run hooks via a bundled python3 shim fallback.
